judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow, but operates with negative profit margins and a high forward P/E. The company has a solid cash position and positive analyst sentiment, yet its current profitability and valuation present tradeoffs.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — indicates strong market adoption.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — positive cash generation despite reported losses.
Total cash $2.39B vs Total debt $62.83M — strong liquidity and low leverage.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 36 analysts with a mean target of $358.82.
Gross margin 71.7% — healthy margin on services.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and Operating margin 0.0% — the company is not currently profitable on an operating basis.
Forward P/E 44.76x — valuation is high, pricing in significant future growth.
Return on equity -2.5% and Return on assets -2.4% — negative returns indicate inefficiency.
Debt/Equity 2.13 — leverage is relatively high, though offset by cash reserves.

news.paragraph: MongoDB (MDB) is seen as well-positioned in the database market with durable growth potential, according to BMO Capital. This positive analyst commentary comes just ahead of the company's upcoming earnings report. Traders should consider the analyst's view alongside the company's performance in the last quarter and the potential for continued growth in the database sector.

headlines.title: MongoDB (MDB) Remains Well-Positioned In The Database Market And Has Durable Growth Potential, Says BMO Capital
